_source: MTEB leaderboard snapshot 2026-05-01 (Worker Z design report values for bge-small-en-v1.5; nomic + mxbai pending re-pin)
_re_pin_policy: Drift = re-pin via PR. Per-cell floor: |measured - expected| <= 1.0 (AC line 3979). Numbers MUST come from the published HuggingFace MTEB leaderboard at https://huggingface.co/spaces/mteb/leaderboard for the exact (model, task) pair; do NOT compute them locally.
_todo_pin_nomic_and_mxbai: Worker AB (2026-05-01) left nomic-ai/nomic-embed-text-v1.5 and mixedbread-ai/mxbai-embed-large-v1 cells as null because the design report only quoted bge values; a follow-up PR must source the leaderboard values for both models on the same 5 tasks before the live matrix can close. Until then the harness skips those cells with WARN(no-baseline) and only PASSES on a fully-pinned bge row.
